query:
-- Find customers where multiple services share the exact same monthlyRevenue value
-- These are candidates for "bundled revenue" groups
SELECT 
  s.customerExternalId,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyRevenue AS shared_revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS service_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(s.planName ORDER BY s.planName SEPARATOR ' | ') AS plan_names
FROM services s
WHERE LOWER(s.billingPlatform) LIKE '%sasboss%'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND s.billingItemId = ''
GROUP BY s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.monthlyRevenue
HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
ORDER BY service_count DESC
LIMIT 15;

-- Find customers where multiple services share the exact same monthlyRevenue value
-- These are candidates for "bundled revenue" groups
SELECT 
  s.customerExternalId,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyRevenue AS shared_revenue,
  COUNT(*) AS service_count,
  GROUP_CONCAT(s.planName ORDER BY s.planName SEPARATOR ' | ') AS plan_names
FROM services s
WHERE LOWER(s.billingPlatform) LIKE '%sasboss%'
  AND s.monthlyRevenue > 0
  AND s.billingItemId = ''
GROUP BY s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.monthlyRevenue
HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
ORDER BY service_count DESC
LIMIT 15;
